text.title: WCAG 2.2 Compliance Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Audit covers 4 of 9 new SC; conformance claim made anyway.
antipattern.fix: Validator rejects sc_results missing any of the 9; full coverage required.

antipattern.symptom: Sticky header clips focus ring on form field at 1.4x zoom.
antipattern.root-cause: Sticky positioning not tested under focus + zoom.
antipattern.fix: CI test: tab through forms at 1.4x zoom; assert focus ring fully visible.

antipattern.symptom: Compare-table checkbox is 20×20 CSS px; fails 2.5.8.
antipattern.fix: Bump to 24×24 minimum; 44×44 for primary; document exceptions explicitly.

antipattern.symptom: Login flow requires solving a picture captcha; no alternative.
antipattern.root-cause: Author treated captcha as security default.
antipattern.fix: Add passkey / magic link / OAuth alternative path.
